description: Governed-state surface map for the Cici instance. Defines all canonical domains of durable truth and their current status.

surfaces.description: Who Cici is: instance record, owner, purpose, capabilities, operational bridges, and related projects.
Communication style, tone preferences, persona notes, and expression conventions for this instance.
What to capture, what to retain, deduplication rules, archiving thresholds, and hygiene schedules.
Recurring operator flows: review cadence, capture habits, promotion triggers, and maintenance rituals.
Tool configurations, MCP client settings, AI gateway preferences, and integration policies.
How to weight and trust different information sources: runtime memory, evidence, governed state, external feeds.
Bridge rules and policies for Supabase and any future runtime connections. Operational policy — not identity truth.

surface_status_values.active: Surface has canonical governed-state artifacts. Changes require proposals or direct owner edit.
surface_status_values.stub: Surface directory exists. No governed artifacts yet. Populated through approved proposals.
surface_status_values.deprecated: Surface is no longer used. Retained for historical reference only.
